ticket_recommendations.title: One or more Python packages fail to import — the service cannot start
ticket_recommendations.summary: Verify every import succeeds: `python -c 'from src.<pkg>.main import app'`. Use string annotations (`-> "TypeName"`) for TYPE_CHECKING-only imports. Use `request: Request` (not `app: FastAPI`) in FastAPI dependency functions.

ticket_recommendations.title: Git identity is not configured for this host, but the repo's tests or workflow expect commit-producing validation
ticket_recommendations.summary: Configure git identity on the host used for audit or repair, or mark the affected verification as blocked by environment rather than as a clean or source-level result.

ticket_recommendations.title: One or more repo-local skills still contain generic placeholder text instead of project-specific guidance
ticket_recommendations.summary: Populate every baseline local skill with concrete repo-specific rules and validation commands; generated `.opencode/skills/` files must not retain template filler.
